summary: PRD (Gate 1) and TEST_PLAN (Gate 2) approved and merged to main in sreenivasmrpivot/legobuilder-challenger-config1. Architecture agent creates notional architecture next. The app is a browser-based 3D LEGO builder using React Three Fiber + Three.js (Web Canvas/3D system type). 11 FRs, 9 NFRs, 2 personas (Casual Builder, AFOL), client-only MVP with LocalForage persistence. Key tech: React + TypeScript + React Three Fiber + Zustand + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Vercel/Netlify hosting.

artifacts.name: PRD
artifacts.description: Product Requirements Document with 11 FRs, 9 NFRs, 2 personas, OKRs, user journeys, clarification report

artifacts.name: TEST_PLAN
artifacts.description: Test Plan with 55 test cases covering all FRs and NFRs; Web Canvas/3D system type; behavioral tests mandatory

recommended_actions: Read docs/PRD.md for full FR/NFR/persona/OKR context
Read docs/TEST_PLAN.md for system type (Web Canvas/3D) and test strategy
Read docs/research/research_analysis.md for tech stack recommendations (React Three Fiber, Zustand, Vite, LocalForage)
Create notional architecture for a client-only SPA with 3D WebGL canvas, React Three Fiber, Zustand state management, and LocalForage persistence
System type is Web (Canvas/3D) — architecture must address InstancedMesh rendering (FR-PERF-001), grid snapping, and browser storage
